title: ai-badger project manifest
description: Provenance record written by scaffold.py: exactly what the framework placed into the target repo, so feed-badger can diff project vs framework.

frameworkCommit.description: Framework git HEAD at scaffold time; null when scaffolded from a plugin cache, which has no .git. The version resolves to the commit in that case (ADR-0001 decision 2).

frameworkDirty.description: True when scaffolded from a working tree with uncommitted changes: provenance that is not reproducible. False from a plugin cache, where local edits are impossible.

generatedAt.description: ISO timestamp stamped by the orchestrator after scaffold (scripts avoid nondeterministic clocks).

skillScope.description: Renamed from pluginScope in v0.7.0. During transition, scaffold writes both.

hash.description: sha256 of the source content at scaffold time.
